description: Baseline: fixed autoload waits and missing semantic readiness helpers remain

asi.hypothesis: Measure current branch before replacing fixed frame/call waits with semantic readiness predicates.

static_re_evidence.title_open_registrar: 0x1409b24e0 sets dialog+0xa40 and transitions dialog+0xa60 to TextFadeOut descriptor 0x142b264f0.
static_re_evidence.menu_member_run: 0x1409aaba0 reads node+0x18 member fn, computes rcx=node+0x10+signext(node+0x20), calls it; vtable target is base+0x2b265d0.
static_re_evidence.profile_load_activate: 0x1409a4670 reads cursor from dialog+0xa38, checks dialog+0xb08 bound, requires singleton 0x144588268, then registers selector via native menu helpers.
static_re_evidence.modal_ok_handler: 0x14078e030 resolves current OK row and commits via 0x14078ef20 when modal progress fields allow.

asi.next_action_hint: Implement helpers in src/experiments.rs, remove the four constants/usages, and update check-autoload-happy-path from old 90-frame threshold to semantic helper enforcement.

description: Replace static fixed-wait gates with semantic readiness predicates and checker enforcement

asi.hypothesis: Semantic predicates can replace all four fixed autoload wait gates without retuning frame counts: title boot readiness, menu action readiness, modal lifecycle, and ProfileLoadDialog field readiness.

implementation_notes.title_boot_ready: Gates on owner committed/requested state 10, owner dispatch table, session singleton, TitleTopDialog vtable, and Loop/TextFadeOut state via native is_in_state.
implementation_notes.title_menu_action_ready: Validates TitleTopDialog registry pointer plus Load-Game MenuMemberFuncJob node vtable/member fields/factory chain before firing.
implementation_notes.startup_modal_blocking_state: Classifies captured MessageBoxDialog by vtable and closing latch; no grace counter remains.
implementation_notes.profile_load_dialog_ready: Polls ProfileLoadDialog vtable, load_activate slot, PlayerGameData, bound/cursor, and load_job_ctx/vtable before activation.

asi.static_re_evidence: Used bounded objdump of 0x1409b24e0, 0x1409aaba0, 0x1407ab370, 0x1409a4670, and 0x14078e030 to ground field/vtable predicates before coding.
asi.next_action_hint: Run syntax/static checks and fix any compile/lint errors; then run the closest available autoload static happy-path checker before considering runtime.
